description: Roman sandals with a hieroglyphic themed footbed for an period-piece feel, by catwalk. These summer essentials can be worn with harem pants for a desi-boho vibe. Upper Synthetic leather forefoot and midfoot strap attached with a central overlay with heavy embellishments Multi-hued footbed for style and comfort A patch at the collar with tie ups for ankle support Outsole TPU outsole with upraised heel and textured grooves for grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
